allow: PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -All -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $py | Select-Object Name,Source; Write-Output "---"; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'python|conda|Anaconda' })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "openapi status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "paths:"; $json.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $_" })

PowerShell(python -c "import httpx; c = httpx.Client\(base_url='http://localhost:8000'\); r = c.patch\('/posts/99999999', json={'message':'x'}\); print\('PATCH no hdr:', r.status_code, r.json\(\)\); r = c.post\('/users', json={'username':'extrafld','email':'x'}\); print\('extra=forbid:', r.status_code\); r = c.get\('/users/zzzzzzz'\); print\('404 shape:', r.status_code, r.json\(\)\); r = c.get\('/'\); print\('GET /:', r.status_code\)")
